scripts.test: pnpm -r test && pnpm build && pnpm test:templates
scripts.netlify:build: pnpm registry:build && pnpm packages:build && pnpm --filter @mont-templates/showcase build && STUDIO_BASE=/studio/ pnpm --filter @mont-templates/creator-studio build && node scripts/build-netlify-site.mjs
scripts.packages:build: pnpm --filter @mont-templates/runtime build && pnpm --filter @mont-templates/template-sdk build && pnpm --filter @mont-templates/preview-renderer build
scripts.pages:build: pnpm registry:build && pnpm packages:build && GITHUB_PAGES=true pnpm --filter @mont-templates/showcase build && STUDIO_BASE=/mont-programmatic-templates/studio/ pnpm --filter @mont-templates/creator-studio build && node scripts/build-netlify-site.mjs
